calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-30-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
David Bergquist, Esq. for Plaintiff: The Regents of the University of California.
Plaintiff's witness: Linda Bardin, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1---Research Agreement-----------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Molecular Diagnostics Inc. dba Ampersand Medical Corporation as follows:
Damages $132,750.00
Costs $76.50, for a total of $132,826.50
Judgment signed in open court.
